lessons.title: Introduction to Vectors
lessons.description: What is a vector? Creating vectors with c(), :, seq(), rep().

lessons.title: Vector Properties: Length and Names
lessons.description: Learn about vector length, naming elements, and the structure of vectors.

lessons.title: Accessing Vector Elements
lessons.description: Indexing vectors with positive/negative integers, logical vectors, and names.

lessons.title: Vectorized Operations
lessons.description: Perform element-wise arithmetic, logical operations, and understand recycling.

lessons.title: Useful Vector Functions
lessons.description: Common functions for vectors: sum, mean, length, unique, sort, etc.

lessons.title: More Vectorized Comparisons and Logical Subsetting
lessons.description: Deep dive into logical operations and subsetting with conditions.
